item.title: Version 0.9.0
item.description: ### Added - Favorite tab name badges on history rows (configurable in Settings > Appearance) - JSON-based theming system: customize colors, corner radii, and spacing via theme files in `~/Library/Application Support/Clipiary/themes/`. Copy and edit `default.json` to create your own themes. - Theme picker in Settings > Appearance - Improved hints when accessibility permissions are missing
